codeReview.summary: OpenTelemetry integration with GenAI semantic conventions is fully implemented and verified. The implementation provides: (1) GenAI semantic convention attribute keys in `gen_ai` module (operation_name, provider_name, request_model, response_model, usage_input_tokens, usage_output_tokens, cache attributes); (2) LlmProvider enum with Anthropic, OpenAI, and Mock variants; (3) TokenPricing struct with provider-specific pricing for cost calculation; (4) LatencyTracker for measuring call duration; (5) GenAiSpanExt trait with methods for recording prompt/completion tokens, response model, cost, and latency on spans. All 12 tests pass including GenAI convention key tests, provider tests, pricing tests, and latency tracker precision tests.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No convention gaps detected. Worker followed AGENTS.md procedures correctly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker used proper scoping (-p swell-core), ran cargo check before test/build, and followed Rust toolchain execution rules.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed Rust skill procedure correctly. No deviations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true, no deviations noted in handoff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: cost.usd and latency_ms attributes use custom keys rather than standardized GenAI attributes. This is intentional (code contains comment 'not standardized yet') but worth noting for future alignment as GenAI conventions evolve.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: opentelemetry.rs:238: self.set_attribute(KeyValue::new("cost.usd", cost)); and line 243: self.set_attribute(KeyValue::new("latency_ms", latency_ms as i64));

summary: PASS - The OpenTelemetry integration with GenAI semantic conventions is fully implemented and passes all verification steps. All expected behavior items are covered: spans follow GenAI conventions with proper gen_ai.* attribute keys, model attribute is set via gen_ai.request.model and gen_ai.response.model, tokens are tracked via gen_ai.usage.input_tokens and gen_ai.usage.output_tokens, provider is set via gen_ai.provider.name, latency is tracked via LatencyTracker with latency_ms attribute, and cost is calculated via TokenPricing with cost.usd attribute. 12 tests pass. No blocking issues found.
